failedAssertions.reason: Assertion failed: entity-category traceability entries did not include all required link types (implementation, type, migration, test) after the setup build call.
Observed Step 8 path uses Task.Agent + Codegen.Writer outputs and did not invoke Bropilot.Generator.generate_all/2 for CRUD artifact generation.
Generator emitted FK-like columns in types/SQL but did not generate SQL REFERENCES/join table or nested relationship routes required by assertion.

appliedUpdates.description: Added CRUD-generator round 1 notes: use mix run --no-start for script checks, observed /api/build files_written=[] behavior, tsc invocation guidance, and transient extract-console 400 note.
